meaning: adj.隐藏的,看不见的n.执行危险任务的士兵,敢死队员
examples: As Georgia's governor, Sonny Perdue, points out, it is not a race.
Elizabeth Kiss is a personal finance specialist with Perdue University in Indiana.
Consul General Gao and Governor Perdue also exchanged views on issues of common concern.
Both Hagan and Perdue were overwhelmingly favored by women voters, according to exit polls.
Lots of prior research suggests Perdue is engaged in little more than wishful thinking.
